props.ChoiceText: You were called to a house where no one would cross one doorway alone, and your work left the fear quieter if not gone.
props.ChoiceBio: A bad thing at the threshold taught you that some victories in folk magic are measured by how much fear remains.

0.TransitionText: Because a bad thing at the threshold taught you that some victories in folk magic are measured by how much fear remains, village need and fear kept you in cunning work.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Cunning Folk, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because a bad thing at the threshold left fear behind it, folk practice no longer felt deep enough, and you pressed deeper.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Occultist, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because a bad thing at the threshold taught you that some victories in folk magic are measured by how much fear remains, fear or wonder turned you back toward sanctioned devotion.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Religious, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TargetText: A household you helped at the threshold still speaks your name when trouble gathers at the door.
